about-intro:
Self-taught full-stack developer and gospel musician based in Nairobi, Kenya.
Founder of CEKA (civic technology), NOD (faith app), and Saem's Tunes (music school) — built and maintained solo using React, TypeScript, Supabase, and Capacitor with Cloudflare infrastructure.
about-tagline: Builds fullstack systems that contribute to creativity, education, civic technology, and that serve the immediate community & inspire around the globe.
